chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1600 & 1601 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.4254/2023 2. For hearing of CMA No.4255/2023 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.4256/2023 22.01.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant Ms. Dilkhurram Shaheen, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 07.10.2025, learned counsel for respondent states that it may be in the interest of justice and revenue that the impugned judgments be set aside and the matters be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
